{{Quote|Will you seek out my apprentice in the Undercity? Her name is Malya. I must know of her fate, whatever it may be. I must know what she... found.|Rukil|<ref name="kotor" />}}
'''Malya''' was [[Rukil]]'s last apprentice, a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] native to the [[Undercity (Taris)|Undercity]] of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]].

==Biography==
While seeking clues to the location of the [[Promised Land]], she found evidence that Rukil's father and grandfather had entered the lower [[Undercity sewers|sewers]] of Taris and entered the information in her journal. In [[3956 BBY]], she was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[rakghoul]]s in the [[Undercity (Taris)|Undercity]] '''surface''' (unlike Rukil's father and grandfather who were killed in the sewers), but her journal and the journals of Rukil's father and grandfather were recovered and taken to Rukil by [[Revan/Legends|Revan]].<ref name="kotor" />

Rukil gave the three journals to [[Gendar]], preparing the Outcasts to leave the village for the Promised Land.<ref name="kotor" />

==Appearances==
